mapper.select:
SELECT s.schedule_code, s.schedule_number, s.schedule_enrol_start_date, s.schedule_enrol_end_date, s.schedule_start_date, s.schedule_start_date_add_date, JSON_UNQUOTE(JSON_EXTRACT(s.schedule_after_date, '$')) AS schedule_after_date_JSON, p.program_name AS title, p.time, s.online, s.part_type, s.enrol_limit, s.enrol_count, s.schedule_status, s.open_status,
s.schedule_group_num, p.program_code, pc.title AS group_title FROM schedule s JOIN program p ON p.program_num = s.program_num JOIN program_category pc ON p.category_num = pc.cate_num ORDER BY s.schedule_start_date DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE schedule SET schedule_start_date = #{schedule_start_date}, online = #{online}, part_type = #{part_type}, schedule_number = #{schedule_number}, schedule_start_date_add_date = #{schedule_start_date_add_date}, schedule_after_date = #{schedule_after_date} WHERE schedule_code = #{schedule_code}
mapper.select:
SELECT s.schedule_code, s.schedule_number, s.schedule_enrol_start_date, s.schedule_enrol_end_date, s.schedule_start_date, s.schedule_start_date_add_date, JSON_UNQUOTE(JSON_EXTRACT(s.schedule_after_date, '$')) AS schedule_after_date_JSON, p.program_name AS title, p.time, s.online, s.part_type, s.enrol_limit, s.enrol_count, s.schedule_status, s.open_status,
s.schedule_group_num, p.program_code, pc.title AS group_title FROM schedule s JOIN program p ON p.program_num = s.program_num JOIN program_category pc ON p.category_num = pc.cate_num WHERE s.schedule_code = #{schedule_code}
mapper.update:
UPDATE schedule SET schedule_status = 1 - schedule_status WHERE schedule_code IN
#{schedule_code}

UPDATE schedule SET open_status = 1 - open_status WHERE schedule_code IN
#{schedule_code}
mapper.select: SELECT s.schedule_code, s.schedule_enrol_start_date, s.schedule_enrol_end_date, s.schedule_start_date, s.schedule_start_date_add_date, JSON_UNQUOTE(JSON_EXTRACT(s.schedule_after_date, '$')) AS schedule_after_date_JSON, p.program_name AS title, p.time, s.online, s.part_type, s.enrol_limit, s.enrol_count, s.schedule_status, s.schedule_group_num, p.program_code, pc.title AS group_title, CASE WHEN e.login_id IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS my_enrol_status FROM schedule s JOIN program p ON p.program_num = s.program_num JOIN program_category pc ON p.category_num = pc.cate_num LEFT JOIN enroll e ON e.s_id = s.s_id AND e.login_id = #{login_id} WHERE schedule_code = #{schedule_code}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO enroll(enrol_waiting_rank, s_id, login_id) VALUES (#{rank}, (SELECT s_id FROM schedule WHERE schedule_code = #{schedule_code}), #{login_id})
mapper.select: SELECT schedule_code, schedule_start_date, enrol_id, program_name AS title, enrol_waiting_rank FROM enroll e JOIN schedule s ON s.s_id = e.s_id JOIN program p ON p.program_num = s.program_num WHERE login_id = #{login_id}
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM enroll WHERE login_id = #{login_id} and s_id = (SELECT s_id FROM schedule WHERE schedule_code = #{schedule_code})
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO cancel_log(reason, s_id, login_id) VALUES (#{reason}, (SELECT s_id FROM schedule WHERE schedule_code = #{schedule_code}), #{login_id})
